I like the softness but it was half way put together and the blanket looked used, just like it had been washed and then repackaged.  Also the top of the rim was not as firm as it was suppose to be.

From the provided Amazon product review, the categories of negative feedback are:

1. Defective Packaging: "halfway put together" and "looked used, just like it had been washed and then repackaged."
2. Damaged or Used Product: "the blanket looked used."
3. Quality Issues: "the top of the rim was not as firm as it was supposed to be."

When I initially received it the bottom foam pad was defective. I contacted the company and they sent out a new one, which was good. I put it together and my dogs and kids loved it. Thenâ€¦ My dog threw up on it. So I removed the removable cover to wash it. When I tried to put it back on the zipper broke. I spent $200 on something that lasted less than 2 weeks.

From the provided Amazon product review, the categories of negative feedback are:

1. Defective Product: "When I initially received it the bottom foam pad was defective."
2. Poor Quality: "the zipper broke."
3. Durability Issues: "I spent $200 on something that lasted less than 2 weeks."

It came when it was expected.  I couldn't get the sides to fluff up easy.  It's really heavy but their customer service was able to help me and offered a return for new item or partial refund for my issues.

1. Difficulty in Fluffing: "I couldn't get the sides to fluff up easily."
2. Heavy Weight: "It's really heavy."
3. Mixed Customer Service Experience: "their customer service was able to help me and offered a return for a new item or partial refund for my issues." (Although the customer service resolved the issues, it can still be considered as a negative aspect if the initial product was unsatisfactory).

I was so excited to receive this bed, but am so disappointed in the quality. The zipper for the base pad broke immediately. As I zipped the flap closed, the zipper pull came straight off. There are random black threads that needed to be cut and the â€œshagâ€ is very thin so the black base layer shows through. I donâ€™t understand why the pillow is beige while the bed and blanket are grey.

From the provided Amazon product review, the categories of negative feedback are:

1. Defective Product: "The zipper for the base pad broke immediately. As I zipped the flap closed, the zipper pull came straight off."
2. Quality Issues: "There are random black threads that needed to be cut" and "the 'shag' is very thin so the black base layer shows through."
3. Inconsistent Design: "I don't understand why the pillow is beige while the bed and blanket are grey."

This bed didn't even last a month!!! I just missed my return date by days. The zipper will not keep the sides in and keeps falling apart. The side piece are now losing stuffing because they wonâ€™t stay inside the bed. I would like a refund or to be able to return this item!!  It is NOT worth $200. Please contact me!

1. Durability Issues: "This bed didn't even last a month!!!"

4. Dissatisfaction with Price: "It is NOT worth $200."
